dialogos.texto_en: Futaro.\nIf it's okay, I want Raiha-chan to come with us too.
Huh? Raiha too?
Yeah, umm...
She'll be my little sister eventually,\nso I want to get closer to her.
O-oh... I see.\nRaiha probably feels the same way.
Ooooohhh?! Is this a reverse proposal?!
Wha-whaaaaat?\nN-no! That's not what I meant!
Ah, but of course, I do want to get married%p-2;――
No, wait!\nAh, ummm!
Please calm down, Miku.\nI sort of understand what you're trying to say.
And Uesugi-kun,\nwhy are you making a girl say such an important thing?
Huh?! No, saying it here is inappropriate, isn't it?!
(No, Miku,\n don't look at me like that!)
Well,\nit's probably better to have a more romantic atmosphere\nfor a proposal, isn't it?
But timing is also important.\nIt's the best feeling to get to hear the words you want\nwhen you want to hear them.
If you let your guard down like that...\nWhat'll happen?
(Let my guard down... So she's implying that\n my relationship with Miku\n hasn't improved much since I confessed.)
(I had exams, and I was busy helping Yotsuba and Itsuki\n prepare for theirs%p-2;――\n%p; But that just sounds like an excuse, doesn't it.)
(Of course, I understand.\n Since I'm going to Tokyo, from here on out\n we'll be forced into a long-distance relationship.)
(I don't have any intention of doubting Miku's feelings,\n but honestly, since we're both unexperienced with\n long-distance relationships... I'm quite anxious.)
(That's why, on this trip, I want to deepen my bond\n with Miku even more.\n For that reason...!)
(During this trip! I will KISS HER!!)
(Last time,\n I was kissed by her when she pushed me down, and\n as a man, I'm not sure how to feel about that situation...)
(But this time, I'll show her the kind of man I am!)
Oh, that's right, Uesugi-san,\ndon't worry about Raiha-chan's travel expenses!
Since we're the ones inviting her,\nit's only natural for us to cover the cost.
O-okay.\nI feel kinda bad. Thanks for the help.
